title: Participant – GDG on Campus Solution Challenge 2025
issuer: Google Developer Groups (GDG) On Campus & Hack2Skill
summary: Successfully participated in the GDG on Campus Solution Challenge 2025, powered by Hack2Skill. Demonstrated commitment to innovation, continuous learning, and developing technology-driven solutions with a positive social impact.
details: Participated in the GDG on Campus Solution Challenge 2025, organized by Google Developer Groups On Campus and powered by Hack2Skill. Collaborated on designing innovative solutions aimed at addressing real-world challenges through technology. The experience enhanced skills in problem-solving, software development, teamwork, and creating impactful solutions aligned with community and societal needs.

title: Participant – HackIndore 3.0
issuer: Shri Govindram Seksaria Institute of Technology and Science (SGSITS), Indore
summary: Successfully participated in HackIndore 3.0 organized by Shri Govindram Seksaria Institute of Technology and Science (SGSITS), Indore. Demonstrated enthusiasm, teamwork, and innovative thinking while collaborating on technology-driven solutions in a competitive hackathon environment.
details: Participated in HackIndore 3.0, a prestigious hackathon organized by SGSITS, Indore. Worked collaboratively with team members to design and develop innovative solutions while enhancing problem-solving, technical, and communication skills. The event provided valuable experience in rapid prototyping, teamwork, and applying technology to real-world challenges under competitive conditions.

title: Winner – HackSetu 1.0 National Hackathon
summary: Awarded as Winner in HackSetu 1.0, a 24-hour National Level Hackathon organized at Amity University Madhya Pradesh under the Amity Innovation Fest. Secured a cash prize of ₹15,000 for demonstrating outstanding innovation, creativity, teamwork, and technical excellence.
details: Team Manthan secured the Winner position in HackSetu 1.0, a 24-hour National Level Hackathon held on 3rd–4th November 2025 at Amity University, Madhya Pradesh. The team was awarded a cash prize of ₹15,000 for delivering an innovative and technically strong solution that stood out among all participating teams. The achievement highlighted excellence in innovation, creativity, teamwork, and problem-solving abilities.

title: Technocrats Innovation Challenge 2K26 Participation Certificate
issuer: Technocrats Institute of Technology & Science, Bhopal
summary: Achieved 1st Runner-Up position in the Technocrats Innovation Challenge 2K26, a prestigious 36-hour national-level hackathon, and won a cash prize of ₹15,000 for developing an innovative technology-driven solution.
details: This certificate recognizes outstanding performance in the Technocrats Innovation Challenge 2K26 organized by Technocrats Institute of Technology & Science, Bhopal in association with DSPL Technologies. Competing against multiple teams in a high-intensity 36-hour hackathon environment, the project demonstrated innovation, technical excellence, teamwork, and problem-solving capabilities, resulting in securing the 1st Runner-Up position along with a ₹15,000 cash prize.
highlights: Participated in a 36-hour national innovation hackathon
Developed innovative real-world solutions under time constraints

title: 1st Position – HackSetu 1.0 National Level Hackathon
issuer: Madhav Institute of Technology & Science (MITS), Gwalior
summary: Recognized during MITS Day 2026 for securing 1st Position in the HackSetu 1.0 National Level Hackathon organized by Amity University Gwalior. Received institutional recognition for outstanding innovation, technical excellence, and team performance.
details: Honored by Madhav Institute of Technology & Science (MITS), Gwalior during MITS Day 2026 for achieving 1st Position in the HackSetu 1.0 National Level Hackathon organized by Amity University Gwalior. As part of a multidisciplinary team, contributed to the development of an innovative solution that demonstrated exceptional technical execution, creativity, and problem-solving capabilities. This achievement brought laurels to the institute and earned recognition in a prestigious national-level competition.

title: Second Runner-Up – DevSprint: Leveraging the Power of AI
issuer: Madhav Institute of Technology & Science (MITS), Gwalior
summary: Achieved the Second Runner-Up position in “DevSprint: Leveraging the Power of AI”, a national-level hackathon conducted by Google Developer Groups on Campus at MITS Gwalior. Awarded ₹1,000 cash prize and Google goodies for delivering an innovative AI-based solution.
details: Secured the Second Runner-Up position as part of Team “Sarthi-X” in the national-level hackathon “DevSprint: Leveraging the Power of AI” organized by Google Developer Groups on Campus at Madhav Institute of Technology & Science (MITS), Gwalior. The event was conducted from 8 Dec 2025 to 24 Jan 2026 and focused on innovative AI-powered solutions. The team was awarded a ₹1,000 cash prize along with Google goodies for exceptional performance, creativity, and technical implementation.

title: HackWise IEEE – National Finalist
summary: Recognized as a National Finalist in HackWise IEEE during Iris’26 for demonstrating innovation, teamwork, and technical problem-solving skills in a competitive national-level hackathon.
details: This certificate acknowledges participation as a National Finalist representing Team Manthan in HackWise IEEE organized during Iris’26 from 16th to 18th January 2026. The competition focused on innovation, collaboration, and rapid solution development under challenging hackathon conditions. The achievement highlights strong technical expertise, teamwork, and the ability to build impactful solutions in a competitive environment.

title: 8th Position – Code Coalescence 2025
issuer: Madhav Institute of Technology & Science (MITS), Gwalior
summary: Received a Certificate of Appreciation for securing 8th Position in Code Coalescence 2025, a hackathon organized by Madhav Institute of Technology & Science (MITS), Gwalior. The event recognized innovative problem-solving, technical implementation, and collaborative teamwork.
details: Participated in Code Coalescence 2025, a hackathon organized by Madhav Institute of Technology & Science (MITS), Gwalior. Secured 8th Position among participating teams by demonstrating strong technical skills, innovative thinking, and effective teamwork. The achievement reflects dedication to software development, problem-solving, and collaborative project execution in a competitive environment.
highlights: Recognized for Innovation and Technical ExcellenceSecured 8th Position

Recognized for Innovation and Technical Excellence

title: Finalist – MediVerse Hackathon 2025
summary: Selected as a Finalist in the MediVerse Hackathon 2025 organized by Medicaps University, Indore. Recognized for outstanding creativity, technical expertise, and innovative problem-solving during a 12-hour national-level innovation sprint.
details: Achieved Finalist status in the MediVerse Hackathon 2025, held on 25th November 2025 at Medicaps University, Indore. Participated in a highly competitive 12-hour national-level innovation sprint, demonstrating strong technical skills, creative thinking, and collaborative problem-solving. The achievement reflects the ability to develop impactful solutions under tight deadlines while competing with talented teams from diverse backgrounds.
